description: Brex provides a spend management and business finance platform with corporate cards, expenses, reimbursements, bill pay, travel, and business accounts. Its developer offering lets customers and partners automate account, payment, transaction, onboarding, accounting, and related workflows.
summary: Brex exposes authenticated REST APIs at `https://api.brex.com` for customer and partner integrations, plus a beta MCP server at `https://api.brex.com/mcp`; no public GraphQL API or first-party CLI was found.
